calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Court Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Marthe Schreiber.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Anthony D. Giles, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 71 Water Partners, LLC.
Samantha Seto, Managing Member for plaintiff 71 Water Partners, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Sharon Seto and David Seto, witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Marthe Schreiber.
Plaintiff's complaint for property damage was filed on June 21, 2018.
Substitute service of defendant Marthe Schreiber took place on August 21, 2018, and was effectuated on August 31, 2018.
Default as to defendant Marthe Schreiber was entered on October 29, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maria A. Viveros, an individual:

Damages/Principal - $72,000.00.
Costs - $555.00.

Total - $72,555.000.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Court Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Continued To Mar-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
